root.sql: SELECT sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no ) as membername, sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date, sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_status , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no, pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no) as member_group_name, sc_lon_m_loan_card.principal_balance, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_old, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_old, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_payment_new, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status, (case sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status when '0' then '-' when '1' then 'งดทั้งหมด' when '2' then 'งดต้น' when '3' then 'งดดอก' when '4' then 'ชำระปกติ' end ) as c_drop_status, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.code_put_old, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.code_put, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.period_compomise, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.installment_old, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.installment_new, sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.remark, sc_mem_m_member_work_info.salary_amount , sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status_last FROM sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det, sc_mem_m_membership_registered, sc_mem_m_chang_request, sc_lon_m_loan_card, sc_mem_m_member_work_info , si_security_user WHERE ( sc_mem_m_chang_request.document_no = sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.document_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_chang_request.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) and ( sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.loan_contract = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no) and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_work_info.membership_no ) and ( si_security_user.user_id = sc_mem_m_chang_request.entry_id ) and ( sc_mem_m_chg_loan_det.drop_status <> '4' ) /*WHERE*/ --and sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date between '01/01/2019' and '01/02/2019' --and sc_mem_m_chang_request.approve_status = '1' order by sc_mem_m_chang_request.operate_date
